candidates.why: This is the primary top-line revenue figure for the company, labeled explicitly as Total Revenue and containing the full sales amount for each year.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials and change in inventories
candidates.why: This income statement line represents direct production input costs and inventory changes, which correspond to cost of goods sold.
This is a balance sheet asset account for raw material inventories, not a period expense, so it should not be used as COGS.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials and change in inventories

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is explicitly SG&A-related stock-based compensation, a classic SG&A component overhead item.
These are general operating overhead costs and fit within SG&A-type expenses (not labeled as totals).
This appears to be a detailed component of other operating expenses and represents additional overhead-type costs.
Administrative expenses are a core SG&A component and clearly part of operating overhead.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of intangibles (a D&A item), which should be excluded from SG&A per instructions.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Excluded 'Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental' because it is an amortization (D&A) item, not SG&A overhead.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is the only explicit income statement item directly related to R&D spending (amortization of capitalized R&D), so it best captures R&D expense.
Balance sheet carrying amount of development costs; not a period expense, so not suitable for XRD.
Gross capitalized R&D asset balance, not an expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization and impairment of R&D assets on the balance sheet, not the current-period R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing item for net R&D costs on balance sheet, not an operating expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

candidates.why: Net interest can be used if no better pure expense line existed, but here a dedicated interest expenses line is available and preferred for gross interest expense.
This is the primary income statement line for interest expenses (negative amounts), best representing XINT.
This is interest on lease liabilities, a subset of total interest; could be included if summing components, but main interest expense line is more standard for XINT.
Other interest-related income/expense; supplemental to core interest expense and not the primary choice.
Represents allocation of profit to minority shareholders, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; not needed if main interest expenses line is available.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders, unrelated to interest expense.
Alternate equity label for non-controlling interests; not an interest expense item.

variables.notes: Chose the main 'Interest expenses' line as the best representation of total interest expense, excluding equity-related and supplemental/partial items.

candidates.row_label: Changes in the fair value of equity investments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: This is a component of OCI, not total book equity, so it should not be used for BE.
This is an investment asset, not shareholders’ equity itself.
This is explicitly the total shareholders’ equity on the balance sheet, which matches the BE definition.
A balancing adjustment line, not the main equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: A balancing line for the statement, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/financing, not equity alone.
This is the income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; useful for performance attribution but not the balance sheet minority equity amount.
This is the balance sheet line for equity attributable to non-controlling interests, directly matching the MIB definition.
Alternate label for minority equity; appears redundant with Non-controlling interests; one main line is sufficient.
Income statement allocation to minority interests, not the stock of minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Portion of comprehensive income attributable to minority interests, not the equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before splitting between parent and minority; not the minority interest balance.
